---
title: "Combined within and across cell variability"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    code_folding: hide
    number_sections: no
    fig_crop: yes
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  library(svglite)
})

## setwd('..')
source("src/ggtheme.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.path = "output/07_plots/",
  dev      = c("png", "svg"),
  dpi      = 300
)

## ── Colour scales ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
wc_scale <- scale_color_gradient(low = "grey90", high = "#000080")   # within-cell
ac_scale <- scale_color_gradient(low = "grey90", high = "#800080")   # across-cell

## ── Theme for this figure (labels ~10–11 pt for A4 output) ───────────────────
fig_base <- 14   # base font size

## Square aspect ratio (panels A–D)
fig_theme_sq <- theme(
  axis.title      = element_text(size = fig_base + 1, face = "bold", color = "black"),
  axis.text       = element_text(size = fig_base,       color = "black"),
  legend.text     = element_text(size = fig_base - 1),
  legend.title    = element_text(size = fig_base,       face = "bold"),
  legend.key.size = unit(0.35, "cm")
)

## Free aspect ratio (panels E–H subplots) if NULL, square if 1
fig_theme_free <- fig_theme_sq + theme(aspect.ratio = 1)

## Smaller theme for performance sub-panels (G/H)
perf_theme <- theme(
  aspect.ratio    = NULL,
  axis.title      = element_text(size = fig_base,     face = "bold", color = "black"),
  axis.text       = element_text(size = fig_base - 1, color = "black"),
  plot.title      = element_text(size = fig_base,     face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
  legend.text     = element_text(size = fig_base - 1),
  legend.title    = element_text(size = fig_base - 1, face = "bold"),
  legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
)

## patchwork annotation theme
pa_theme <- theme(
  plot.title = element_text(size = fig_base + 1, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
)

## Helper: add "simul. X" label inside the upper-right corner of a plot
add_simul_label <- function(p, label) {
  p + annotate(
    "text",
    x = Inf, y = Inf,
    label    = label,
    hjust    = 1.08, vjust = 1.6,
    size     = 3.2,
    fontface = "italic",
    color    = "grey35"
  )
}
```

```{r load-data}

all_long_wc <- readRDS("rds/all.long_within.rds")
jnt_wc      <- readRDS("rds/jnt_within.rds")
s_plots_wc  <- readRDS("rds/s_plots_within.rds")
n_plots_wc  <- readRDS("rds/n_plots_within.rds")

all_long_ac <- readRDS("rds/all.long_across.rds")
jnt_ac      <- readRDS("rds/jnt_across.rds")
s_plots_ac  <- readRDS("rds/s_plots_across.rds")
n_plots_ac  <- readRDS("rds/n_plots_across.rds")
```

```{r panels-ABCD}
## ── Row 1: scatter plots ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

A <- add_simul_label(
  ggplot(all_long_wc, aes(x = meth, y = sampen, color = wc_vi)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.5) +
    theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + wc_scale + fig_theme_sq +
    labs(x = "avg. methylation", y = "sample entropy", color = "wcVI"),
  "simul. II"
)

B <- add_simul_label(
  ggplot(all_long_wc, aes(x = shannon, y = sampen, color = wc_vi)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 0.5) +
    theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + wc_scale + fig_theme_sq +
    labs(x = "Shannon entropy", y = "sample entropy", color = "wcVI"),
  "simul. II"
)


C <- add_simul_label(
  ggplot(all_long_ac, aes(x = meth, y = sampen, color = bc_vi)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.5) +
    theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + ac_scale + fig_theme_sq +
    labs(x = "avg. methylation", y = "sample entropy", color = "acVI"),
  "simul. III"
)


D <- add_simul_label(
  ggplot(all_long_ac, aes(x = shannon, y = sampen, color = bc_vi)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 0.5) +
    theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + ac_scale + fig_theme_sq +
    labs(x = "Shannon entropy", y = "sample entropy", color = "acVI"),
  "simul. III"
)
```

```{r panels-EF}
## ── Row 2: scMET panels ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

## E: within-cell (wcVI)
e_mu <- ggplot(jnt_wc, aes(x = avg_meth, y = scmet_mu, color = wc_vi)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 0.5) +
  theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + wc_scale + fig_theme_free +
  labs(x = "avg. methylation", y = expression(scMET ~ mu), color = "wcVI")

e_gamma <- ggplot(jnt_wc, aes(x = avg_meth, y = scmet_gamma, color = wc_vi)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 0.5) +
  theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + wc_scale + fig_theme_free +
  labs(x = "avg. methylation", y = expression(scMET ~ gamma), color = "wcVI")

e_epsilon <- ggplot(jnt_wc, aes(x = avg_meth, y = scmet_epsilon, color = wc_vi)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 0.5) +
  theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + wc_scale + fig_theme_free +
  labs(x = "avg. methylation", y = expression(scMET ~ epsilon), color = "wcVI")

E_group <- wrap_plots(e_mu, e_gamma, e_epsilon, ncol = 3, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = "simul. II", theme = pa_theme) &
  theme(legend.position = "right")

## E_group <- (e_mu + e_gamma + e_epsilon)

## E_group <- E_group +
##   plot_layout(ncol = 3, guides = "collect") +
##   plot_annotation(title = "simul. III", theme = pa_theme)


## F: across-cell (acVI)
f_mu <- ggplot(jnt_ac, aes(x = avg_meth, y = scmet_mu, color = bc_vi)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 0.5) +
  theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + ac_scale + fig_theme_free +
  labs(x = "avg. methylation", y = expression(scMET ~ mu), color = "acVI")

f_gamma <- ggplot(jnt_ac, aes(x = avg_meth, y = scmet_gamma, color = bc_vi)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 0.5) +
  theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + ac_scale + fig_theme_free +
  labs(x = "avg. methylation", y = expression(scMET ~ gamma), color = "acVI")

f_epsilon <- ggplot(jnt_ac, aes(x = avg_meth, y = scmet_epsilon, color = bc_vi)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 0.5) +
  theme_ng(base_size = fig_base) + ac_scale + fig_theme_free +
  labs(x = "avg. methylation", y = expression(scMET ~ epsilon), color = "acVI")

F_group <- wrap_plots(f_mu, f_gamma, f_epsilon, ncol = 3, guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(title = "simul. III", theme = pa_theme) &
  theme(legend.position = "right")

## F_group <- (f_mu + f_gamma + f_epsilon)

## F_group <- F_group +
##   plot_layout(ncol = 3, guides = "collect") +
##   plot_annotation(title = "simul. III", theme = pa_theme)




```

```{r panels-GH}
## ── Row 3: performance grids ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
## Layout per half (G or H):
##   row 1 (S grid, x = # cells):    NMI | CPU time | memory
##   row 2 (N grid, x = # features): NMI | CPU time | memory
##
## x-axis label shown on the middle panel of each row (acts as shared label).
## y-axis label "performance" shown only on the leftmost panel of each row.

make_perf_grid <- function(s_plots, n_plots) {
  # S grid (varying # cells)
  g_s_nmi <- s_plots$nmi     + perf_theme +
    labs(title = "NMI",           x = "",        y = "performance")
  g_s_cpu <- s_plots$seconds + perf_theme +
    labs(title = "CPU time (s)",  x = "# cells", y = "")
  g_s_mem <- s_plots$mem     + perf_theme +
    labs(title = "memory (MB)",   x = "",        y = "")

  # N grid (varying # features)
  g_n_nmi <- n_plots$nmi     + perf_theme +
    labs(title = "NMI",           x = "",           y = "performance")
  g_n_cpu <- n_plots$seconds + perf_theme +
    labs(title = "CPU time (s)",  x = "# features", y = "")
  g_n_mem <- n_plots$mem     + perf_theme +
    labs(title = "memory (MB)",   x = "",           y = "")

  wrap_plots(
    g_s_nmi, g_s_cpu, g_s_mem,
    g_n_nmi, g_n_cpu, g_n_mem,
    ncol    = 3,
    guides  = "collect"
  ) & theme(legend.position = "bottom")
}

G_inner <- make_perf_grid(s_plots_wc, n_plots_wc)
H_inner <- make_perf_grid(s_plots_ac, n_plots_ac)

G_group <- G_inner + plot_annotation(title = "simul. II",  theme = pa_theme)
H_group <- H_inner + plot_annotation(title = "simul. III", theme = pa_theme)
```

```{r combined, fig.width=15, fig.height = 15}
## ── Assemble ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
row1 <- (A | B | C | D)
row2 <- wrap_plots(E_group, F_group, ncol = 2)
row3 <- wrap_plots(G_group, H_group, ncol = 2)

fig <- row1 / row2 / row3 +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.8, 0.7, 2)) +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = list(c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "", "", "F", "", "", "G", "H")),
    theme = theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))
  )

print(fig)
```

```{r save-figure}
ggsave(
  filename = "output/figure_simulations_combined.svg",
  plot     = fig,
  width    = 8.27,
  height   = 11.69,
  units    = "in"
)

ggsave(
  filename = "output/figure_simulations_combined.pdf",
  plot     = fig,
  width    = 8.27,
  height   = 11.69,
  units    = "in"
)
```
